mission: Clowder is production-ready: all known bugs fixed, interview shows Product Owner labels, LLM timeouts handled gracefully, error toasts visible, 15+ unit tests passing, deployed and E2E verified

tasks.description: CLW-01: Fix PO label — show 'Product Owner' instead of 'System' during interview
tasks.notes: Phase-aware label: 'Product Owner' during interview, 'System' otherwise

tasks.description: CLW-02: Increase LLM timeout for ideation — 60s + retry
tasks.notes: callPOAgent accepts configurable timeout (default 60s). Retry once with 90s. Applied to orchestrate() and post-interview auto-trigger.
Already implemented: sonner Toaster in root.tsx, toast.error in useClowderSession.ts
45 tests across 4 files. Added builder.server.test.ts with 10 parseDataModel tests.

NOT BLOCKED: builder.server.ts already calls GET /v1/git/develop/token?installation_id=113953574 for ephemeral GitHub App tokens. The real issue was KAPABLE_API_URL=localhost inside Incus (fixed in CLW-07). No static PAT needed.
Script already existed. Ran it — 'Nothing to purge — all clean.'
Pushed 3 commits, triggered pipeline (549b7278), deploy succeeded. Fixed container env vars (KAPABLE_API_URL → https://api.kapable.dev). E2E verified: session created, PO responded.
Reviewed 10 Clowder draft items. 3 completed by this sprint (IMP-823, IMP-824, test suite). 2 new items filed for deploy env var issues.

fallback_queue.description: Run E2E tests on all changes, then fix any failures found

friction.description: agentboard events log returns 500 — cannot log events to platform board
friction.suggestion: Check events table migration / API handler on production

friction.description: Incorrectly assumed GITHUB_TOKEN was missing. builder.server.ts already calls /v1/git/develop/token for ephemeral App tokens. The real blocker was KAPABLE_API_URL=localhost inside Incus container (fixed in CLW-07).
friction.suggestion: Always check existing code for platform token endpoints before assuming a static secret is needed. Document token patterns in path-scoped rules.

friction.description: Connect App Pipeline overwrites .env — manually added env vars lost on redeploy
friction.suggestion: Set all required env vars in platform environment config so they persist across deploys

friction.description: KAPABLE_API_URL=http://localhost:3003 doesn't work inside Incus containers — localhost is the container, not the host
friction.suggestion: Use https://api.kapable.dev or 10.34.0.1:3003 as API URL inside containers

friction.description: agentboard backlog transition returns 'error decoding response body' on state transitions
friction.suggestion: Check transition API response format — may be returning empty body instead of JSON
